_comment: v5.6.6 — Codex follow-up review fixes. Closes 4 dialog defects surfaced after the v5.6.5 review: (1) high-stakes paraphrase gaps in the safety detector (drug names like Аспирин, contract-signing «қол қояйын», bank-loan «алуға кеңес бер»); (2) current-data detector missing market terms (Bitcoin, бағасы) and time adverbs (Бүгін); (3) lesson context inheritance — clean Rust code after AskExercise must keep the active curriculum topic instead of treating syntax tokens like `println` as the lesson; (4) AskPreviousError recall — «Ал алдыңғы қате неде болды?» must consult session state populated by a prior failed SubmitSolution, not retrieval-fallback to the literal token «болд».

cases.query: Маған банк несиесін алуға кеңес бер.
